name: cloud-interconnect
title: GCP Hybrid Connectivity — Cloud Interconnect
summary: Creates a Cloud Router and Interconnect VLAN attachments — PARTNER (pairing key handed to a service provider, who establishes BGP) or DEDICATED (bound to a physical interconnect with a module-managed BGP session).

governance.name: prefix
governance.description: Short organization or project prefix. First token of every resource name: {prefix}-{cloud}-{environment}-{resource-type}-{suffix}.

governance.name: environment
governance.description: Deployment environment identifier (e.g., dev, test, prod). Used in resource names and mandatory labels.

governance.name: owner
governance.description: Team or individual that owns the deployed resources. Applied as the mandatory 'owner' label where supported (lowercased).

governance.name: cost_center
governance.description: Cost center code. Applied as the mandatory 'cost_center' label where supported (lowercased).

governance.name: additional_tags
governance.description: Optional additional labels merged beneath the mandatory label set (lowercased).

governance.name: name_suffix
governance.description: Final token of every resource name, used to disambiguate multiple instances of this module.

module.name: project_id
module.description: GCP project ID hosting the attachments.

module.name: region
module.description: Region of the Cloud Router and attachments.

module.name: network_self_link
module.description: Self-link of the VPC network. Supplied as a plain value — no framework dependency is implied.

module.name: router_asn
module.description: Google-side BGP ASN for the Cloud Router. Partner attachments commonly require 16550.

module.name: attachments
module.type: map(object({ type = string edge_availability_domain = optional(string, "AVAILABILITY_DOMAIN_1") interconnect_self_link = optional(string) vlan_tag = optional(number) candidate_subnets = optional(list(string), []) bandwidth = optional(string, "BPS_1G") admin_enabled = optional(bool, true) bgp = optional(object({ session_range = string peer_ip = string peer_asn = number })) }))
module.description: Interconnect VLAN attachments keyed by logical name. PARTNER attachments output a pairing_key for the service provider and the BGP session is established by the partner. DEDICATED attachments reference a physical interconnect (ordered out-of-band) and define their own BGP session.

outputs.name: gateway_id
outputs.description: ID of the Cloud Router (the BGP speaker for all attachments).

outputs.name: connection_ids
outputs.description: Map of logical attachment name to interconnect attachment ID.

outputs.name: attachment_self_links
outputs.description: Map of logical attachment name to self-link (consumable as NCC hybrid-spoke URIs).

outputs.name: pairing_keys
outputs.description: Map of logical PARTNER attachment name to pairing key — hand to the service provider. SENSITIVE.

outputs.name: cloud_router_ip_addresses
outputs.description: Map of logical attachment name to the Google-side BGP address allocated on the attachment.
